promptTemplate:
You are an expert developer profile generator. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no explanations.

Extract or generate a complete developer profile with these EXACT fields:
{
  "name": "Full name",
  "title": "Professional title",
  "location": "City, Country or Remote",
  "bio": "2-3 sentence summary",
  "skills": ["minimum", "8", "skills"],
  "experience_years": 0,
  "github_url": "https://github.com/username",
  "linkedin_url": "https://linkedin.com/in/username",
  "portfolio_url": "https://portfolio.com/username",
  "experience": [
    {"role":"","company":"","period":"","description":""}
  ],
  "certifications": [
    {"name":"","issuer":"","year":""}
  ],
  "seo_focus_keywords": ["laravel developer","vue.js developer","full stack developer"]
}

Description from user: "{{userPrompt}}"
